task_completion.description: Open Blender and load the source BMW model.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Blender UI is open, and the 3D viewport displays the BMW car model.

task_completion.description: Add a Grease Pencil object to the scene.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Outliner panel shows a new Grease Pencil object (e.g., 'Line Art', 'Stroke', or similar Grease Pencil icon) added to the scene.

task_completion.description: Configure a Line Art modifier targeting the 'BMW' collection.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Modifiers Properties tab for the Grease Pencil object shows a 'Line Art' modifier, with the 'Source Type' set to Collection and the 'Collection' field explicitly set to 'BMW'.

task_completion.description: Bake the line art into editable strokes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Bake Line Art' button in the modifier is clicked, OR the 3D viewport shows the generated outlines on the car, OR the Grease Pencil object is shown in Edit Mode with visible, selectable vertices along the strokes.

task_completion.description: Save the project to the specified path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog shows the path '/home/ga/BlenderProjects/bmw_line_art.blend', or the top title bar of the Blender application updates to show 'bmw_line_art.blend'.

integrity.description: The agent used the Blender graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through Blender menus, the Outliner, and the Properties panels rather than executing terminal commands.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the manual setup by running a single Python script to complete all steps.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Scripting workspace or Python Console is not the primary method used to add the modifier and bake the strokes.

integrity.description: The agent did not use the terminal to copy or download a pre-made solution file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows do not show commands like 'cp' or 'wget' being used to place a file named 'bmw_line_art.blend' directly into the target directory.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The source file is /home/ga/BlenderProjects/bmw_source.blend. The target collection for the Line Art modifier MUST be 'BMW'. The expected output file is /home/ga/BlenderProjects/bmw_line_art.blend. The task requires baking the line art into editable strokes, which should result in more than 10 strokes generated (ignore the metadata claim of 50, the actual minimum threshold is >10).
